content.question: The direct causal effect of rural school closures on social mobility in Hungary has not been empirically quantified; evidence is drawn from Chile and Serbia (non-Hungarian contexts) or correlational Hungarian data.
content.reduction_path: A Hungarian natural experiment (e.g., variation in closure timing by municipality) or quasi-experimental matching study on cohorts before/after school closures, linked to adult earnings/educational outcomes via tax or administrative data.
